name: Spaghetti Squash Florentine
recipeIngredient: 10 ounce frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1/2 cup part skim milk mozzarella cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Place squash in a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat. Cook for 20 minutes or until fork-tender. Remove from water.
2. Halve the squash lengthwise; remove seeds.
3. In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, spinach, egg beaters, and seasonings; mix well.
4. Spread mixture evenly in a 13x9-inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan and nonfat mozzarella cheeses over the spinach mixture.
6. In a large bowl, toss squash with spaghetti sauce until well coated.
7. Arrange squash mixture on top of the spinach mixture.
8. Top with part skim milk mozzarella cheese.
9. Cover with foil; bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Makes 6 servings.
